svg.title: Estimated daily online time by activity (India)
svg.desc: Estimated daily online time by activity (India). Source: NCAER IHDS Wave 3 and IAMAI-Kantar 2024. Illustrative allocation based on reported share of use; not a direct time-use measurement.

text.style: font: 10px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle
